title: Beta Ultimate
description: This modpack tries to recreate atmosphere of beta versions, but with some qol and vanilla+ additions.
body:
This modpack tries to recreate beta versions of Minecraft, but in addition, there are many new vanilla+ features like stamina, seasons, mixed combat system, classes and more. Imagine what could have been if Minecraft was more RPG-like game, that's Beta Ultimate!

![Title screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0161c796799f4623dc30479a796c1df6eac16aff.png)

**Advice: I recommend playing modpack in Multiplayer to get more Nostalgic Experience with your friends**

<details>
<summary>Features (Contain Spoilers)</summary>

- Old Generation of Overworld and Nether
- Stamina System which affects the sprint mechanics
- Sword Blocking Mechanic, but with modern combat
- Shield Dashing
- RPG Classes
- Seasons
- Reworked Enchant and Potion Brewing systems
- Mobs from Mob Votes
- Photo Mode ([Source](https://github.com/forkiesassds/PhotoMode))
- Multiplayer Compatible

</details>
